MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian M. Junginger, Esq. of McInerney & Dillon, T:510.465.7100, for defendant/moving party;
Jennifer Young, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. Parties inform the Court that a partial satisfaction of judgment has been filed. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling, with modification as to the amount of the judgment.

DEFENDANT CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC and CAR LE's MOTION TO LIFT DEFAULT AND SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT is granted in part. An amended judgment superseding the judgment filed January 18, 2018 and takes into account the partial satisfaction of judgment will be prepared and submitted for the Court's approval. [See the Court's tentative ruling.]

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Continued To Mar-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jennifer Young, Esq. 209-952-5000 of A. Peter Rausch Jr. Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Brian Junginger, Esq. 510-465-7100 of McInerny & Dillon for Defendant CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues interest rate and cites 311 South Spring street case. Plaintiff argues alter ego. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC AND CARL LE'S MOTION TO LIFT THE DEFAULT AND SET ASDE THE JUDGMENT is continued to March 26, 2018 at 9:30 to allow Defendant's counsel to file an additional brief limited to the 2 issues only. Defendant's additional brief is due on 3/1/18, Plaintiff's response is due on 3/15/18. The pending request for a temporary restraining order is also continued to 3/26/18.

Plaintiff to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
